# SortableList

**Status:** Stable  
**Category:** collections  
**Import:** `drawui`  
**Emitted class(es):** `reorderable-list`, `reorderable-item`, `drag-handle`, `reorderable-placeholder`, `is-dragging`, `InputList`, `InputListItem`, `Checkbox`

Drag-and-drop reorderable list with optional per-item checkboxes.

_Source: `src/components/lists/SortableList.js`_

## Import

```js
import { SortableList } from "drawui";
```

## Examples

### SortableList

```js
return new SortableList(
    [{ label: "Wall", checked: true }, { label: "Slab", checked: false }, { label: "Column" }, { label: "Beam" }],
    (items) => console.log("reordered", items),
  ).container;
```
